baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Make a small fix in this repo, but there are unrelated modified files already present.
evals.expected_output: The agent inspects git status, reads the target file and a related caller/test before editing, preserves unrelated changes, runs relevant validation, and reports the result.
assertions: Mentions existing dirty worktree state before editing.
Reads target and related files before applying changes.
Does not revert unrelated user changes.
Runs or explicitly justifies skipped validation.
